import React from 'react'; import { Home, Star, Github, Linkedin, Brain, BarChart3, Target, Zap, Shield, Database, Settings, Users, Book } from 'lucide-react'; const DocumentationPage: React.FC = () => { return (
{/* Header */}

Documentation

Complete guide to layoutgod - the ultimate keyboard layout analyzer with scientific precision

{/* Content */}
{/* Project Header */}

🎯 layoutgod

TypeScript React Node.js SQLite Tailwind CSS

The ultimate keyboard layout analyzer with scientific precision

Compare layouts, get personalized recommendations, and optimize your typing experience through data-driven analysis.

Designed and developed by Rishik Dulipyata

LinkedIn GitHub
{/* Features Section */}

✨ Features

🧠 Intelligent Adaptive Testing System

  • 5-Stage Progressive Analysis - Smart tests that adapt to your typing patterns
  • Weakness Detection - Identifies weak fingers, problematic bigrams, and error patterns
  • Personalized Text Generation - Each test targets your specific problem areas
  • Algorithmic Recommendations - Get layout suggestions based on your unique typing profile through statistical matching
  • Comprehensive Improvement Plans - Targeted exercises to strengthen weak areas

🔬 Scientific Analysis Engine

  • 17 Comprehensive Metrics - Covering effort, distance, ergonomics, and flow patterns
  • Advanced Corpus Analysis - 1M+ word dataset for realistic typing assessment
  • Biomechanical Modeling - Finger strength and ergonomic calculations
  • Real-time Analysis - Instant feedback as you modify layouts

🎨 Advanced Layout Tools

  • Visual Layout Designer - Create and modify layouts with drag-and-drop interface
  • Multiple Format Support - Import/export KLC, JSON, and visual text formats
  • Live Preview - See analysis updates in real-time as you design
  • Template Library - Start from popular layouts (QWERTY, Dvorak, Colemak, etc.)
{/* Quick Start */}

🚀 Quick Start

Prerequisites

  • Node.js (v16 or later)
  • npm (comes with Node.js)
  • Git (for cloning the repository)

1. Clone the repository

                  {`git clone https://github.com/your-username/keyboard-layout-analyzer.git
cd keyboard-layout-analyzer`}

2. Install root dependencies

                  npm install

3. Set up the backend

                  {`cd server
npm install
cp .env.example .env  # Configure your environment variables
npm run migrate       # Set up the database
npm run seed         # Populate with sample layouts`}

4. Set up the frontend

                  {`cd ../client
npm install`}

5. Start the development environment

                  {`cd ..
npm run dev  # Starts both frontend and backend concurrently`}

🎉 That's it! The app will be available at http://localhost:3000

{/* Adaptive Testing System */}

🧠 Adaptive Testing System

The Adaptive Testing System is the crown jewel of layoutgod - a statistically-powered analysis engine that learns your typing patterns and provides personalized layout recommendations through computational linguistics and biomechanical modeling.

5-Stage Progressive Analysis

🎯 Stage 1: Baseline Assessment

  • Duration: 60 seconds
  • Purpose: Establish your natural typing patterns
  • Content: Common English words and phrases
  • Analysis: Overall WPM, accuracy, and basic finger usage patterns

💪 Stage 2: Finger Weakness Detection

  • Duration: 60 seconds
  • Purpose: Identify which fingers are your weakest links
  • Content: Text heavily featuring keys used by your weakest fingers
  • Analysis: Per-finger error rates and response times

🔤 Stage 3: Bigram Challenge

  • Duration: 60 seconds
  • Purpose: Find problematic letter combinations
  • Content: Words containing your most error-prone bigrams
  • Analysis: Same-finger bigrams, stretches, and awkward sequences

🌊 Stage 4: Flow & Rhythm Test

  • Duration: 60 seconds
  • Purpose: Assess typing flow and hand coordination
  • Content: Words testing alternation, rolls, and smooth sequences
  • Analysis: Hand balance, rhythm consistency, and natural flow patterns

🏆 Stage 5: Comprehensive Challenge

  • Duration: 60 seconds
  • Purpose: Final assessment combining all weakness areas
  • Content: Adaptive text targeting all identified problem areas
  • Analysis: Overall improvement and comprehensive skill assessment

🎮 Getting Started

  1. Visit the homepage and click the prominent "🧠 Find Your Layout" button
  2. Follow the guided 5-test sequence (5 minutes total)
  3. Receive your personalized layout recommendations
  4. Explore suggested layouts with detailed explanations
  5. Download improvement plans and practice exercises
{/* Key Metrics */}

📊 Key Metrics Explained

🎯 Ergonomic Metrics

  • Total Effort: Cumulative typing strain based on key difficulty and finger strength
  • Pinky Distance: Proportion of finger travel performed by weakest fingers
  • Lateral Stretches: Awkward sideways finger movements within same hand

🌊 Flow & Rhythm

  • Inward Rolls: Smooth finger sequences rolling toward keyboard center
  • Hand Alternation: Sequences alternating between left and right hands
  • Direction Changes: Trigrams requiring awkward direction reversals

🎳 Precision & Accuracy

  • Same Finger Bigrams: Letter pairs requiring same finger consecutively
  • Pinky Scissors: Awkward pinky-ring finger crossing movements
  • Skip Bigrams: Adjacent keys skipped in same row sequences

📍 Key Positioning

  • Center Column Usage: Hard-to-reach T/Y column utilization
  • Pinky Off-Home: Pinky keystrokes away from home row position
  • Row Jumping: Bigrams requiring two-row vertical movements
{/* Technology Stack */}

🛠️ Technology Stack

Frontend

  • ⚛️ React 18 - Modern component-based UI framework
  • 📘 TypeScript - Type-safe JavaScript with excellent tooling
  • 🎨 Tailwind CSS - Utility-first CSS framework for rapid styling
  • 📊 Recharts - Composable charting library for data visualization
  • 🎯 Lucide React - Beautiful, customizable icon set
  • 🧭 React Router - Declarative routing for single-page applications

Backend

  • 🟢 Node.js - JavaScript runtime for server-side development
  • 🚀 Express.js - Fast, minimal web framework for Node.js
  • 💾 SQLite3 - Lightweight, embedded SQL database engine
  • 🔐 Security Stack - Helmet, bcrypt, JWT for comprehensive security
  • 📁 File Processing - Multer for file uploads, Cheerio for HTML parsing
  • ⚙️ Development Tools - Nodemon, dotenv, Joi validation
{/* API Examples */}

🎮 API Usage Examples

Starting an Adaptive Test

                  {`// Start a new adaptive test session
fetch('/api/adaptive-test/start', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
})
.then(response => response.json())
.then(session => {
  console.log('Test Session Started:', session);
  // {
  //   sessionId: 'unique-session-id',
  //   testNumber: 1,
  //   testText: 'Generated text for typing...',
  //   totalTests: 5,
  //   instructions: 'Test-specific instructions'
  // }
});`}

Submitting Test Results

                  {`// Submit results for current test and get next test or recommendations
fetch('/api/adaptive-test/submit', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  body: JSON.stringify({
    sessionId: 'your-session-id',
    testNumber: 1,
    userInput: 'what the user actually typed',
    targetText: 'the original test text',
    wpm: 65,
    accuracy: 94.5,
    keyStats: { 'a': { correct: 10, incorrect: 1 } },
    fingerStats: { 'LI': { correct: 25, incorrect: 2 } },
    testDuration: 60
  })
})
.then(response => response.json())
.then(result => {
  if (result.completed) {
    console.log('All tests complete!', result.recommendations);
  } else {
    console.log('Next test:', result.testText);
  }
});`}

Analyzing a Layout

                  {`// Example API call to analyze a custom layout
const layoutData = {
  keys: {
    'q': 'q', 'w': 'd', 'e': 'r', 'r': 'w', 't': 'b',
    'y': 'j', 'u': 'f', 'i': 'u', 'o': 'p', 'p': ';',
    // ... more key mappings
  }
};

fetch('/api/analyze', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
  body: JSON.stringify({ layout_data: layoutData })
})
.then(response => response.json())
.then(stats => {
  console.log('Layout Analysis:', stats);
  // Stats include all 17 metrics with detailed breakdowns
});`}
{/* Contributing */}

🤝 Contributing

Contributions are welcome! Here's how you can help:

  1. 🍴 Fork the repository
  2. 🌟 Create a feature branch: git checkout -b amazing-feature
  3. 💾 Commit your changes: git commit -m 'Add amazing feature'
  4. 📤 Push to the branch: git push origin amazing-feature
  5. 🔄 Open a Pull Request

Development Guidelines

  • Follow TypeScript best practices
  • Maintain test coverage for new features
  • Use conventional commit messages
  • Update documentation for API changes
{/* Footer */}

🙏 Acknowledgments

  • Keyboard Layout Community for testing and feedback
  • Open Source Contributors for libraries and tools
  • Typography Researchers for layout optimization insights
  • Ergonomics Experts for biomechanical guidance

Built with ❤️ by Rishik Dulipyata

For keyboard enthusiasts and ergonomics researchers worldwide

⭐ Star this repository if it helped you! ⭐
